_publications._publicationTitle: Dose-dependent effects of focal fractionated irradiation on secondary malignant neoplasms in Nf1 mutant mice.

_contextSnippet: We observed elevated pAkt and pS6 levels in most tumors compared to normal tissues with considerable variability between individual tumors
details: Detected elevated pAkt levels in most radiation-induced tumors compared to normal tissues with considerable variability between individual tumors
